title: How AI guardrails are impeding the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers
snippet: We spoke with several cybersecurity researchers, who look for unknown vulnerabilities and develop tools to exploit them, about how OpenAI’s and Anthropic’s guardrails affect their work.
